@'

# GitHub Labels

| Label              | Purpose                             |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------- |
| `bug`              | Defect or regression                |
| `feature`          | New product or platform capability  |
| `documentation`    | Documentation changes               |
| `ci`               | CI/CD workflow changes              |
| `dependencies`     | Dependency updates                  |
| `security`         | Security-related work               |
| `performance`      | Runtime or build performance        |
| `mobile`           | React Native work                   |
| `web`              | React web work                      |
| `shared-package`   | Shared package changes              |
| `breaking`         | Breaking API or architecture change |
| `good first issue` | Suitable for new contributors       |
| `help wanted`      | Additional assistance requested     |
| '@                 | Set-Content docs\github\LABELS.md   |
